backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping design/UI feature IDs to their associated source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels for the Luminia Group landing page redesign.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing key design and functional changes made across components, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base layer defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Luminia Group React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, and Footer in a dark obsidian layout.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with a brand column, portfolio list, and contact/social links, featuring scroll-triggered fade-in animations and gold accent styling.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with a multi-layer background image overlay, fluid clamp-based typography, animated entrance transitions, a gold divider, and a smooth-scroll CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ManifestoSection: Manifesto section featuring a large fluid quote with gold-highlighted keywords, scroll-triggered animations, radial gold glow, and horizontal gold rule dividers.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware blur effect, smooth anchor scrolling, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu for the Luminia Group site.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryDetail: Modal dialog that displays detailed information about a selected subsidiary, supporting keyboard navigation (arrow keys/Escape) and animated transitions between entries.
frontend/src/components/SubsidiaryGrid.t: Defines the list of seven Luminia subsidiaries and renders them in a scroll-animated grid, opening a SubsidiaryDetails modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePopup.tsx: Full-screen welcome modal shown once per session (via sessionStorage) with animated entrance/exit, decorative corner accents, and a dismiss button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static corporate website.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when a referenced element enters the viewport, returning a ref and an isVisible boolean for scroll-triggered animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that defines a dark luxury design system using Tailwind CSS, custom OKLCH color tokens (gold, obsidian, charcoal, ivory), and utility classes for glows, gradients, and typography using Cormorant Garamond and Montserrat fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with luxury color tokens (gold, obsidian, charcoal, ivory), custom display font sizes, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Luminia Group app, tracking existing features (landing page redesign, hero revamp, popup polish, subsidiary grid, hero background image) and configuration for the build planner.
